Then there's Vincent. Oh! Vincent van Gogh! That's definitely a famous painter. So Vincent, one of the penguins, would share his name with Vincent van Gogh. That seems like a strong candidate. Gwen. But maybe the question is looking for a more well-known name. James. There's James Abbott McNeill Whistler, an American artist known for his paintings and etchings.
